info.title: shipmail API
info.description: API-first email provider for creators, freelancers, and businesses of all sizes.

get.description: Public health check endpoint. No authentication required.

post.description: Add a custom domain to your account. After creation, configure DNS records and verify.

get.description: List all domains in your account with cursor-based pagination.

patch.description: Update domain settings such as the catch-all mailbox.

delete.description: Permanently delete a domain and all associated mailboxes.

post.description: Check DNS records for the domain and update verification status. Rate limited to 1 request per minute. For automated setups, subscribe to the domain.verified webhook event instead of polling this endpoint.
Search for available domain names to register. Returns availability and pricing information.

keyword.description: Keyword to search for available domains.

post.description: Register a new domain through shipmail. Charges the saved payment method and returns the created Domain object. Requires an active subscription.

years.description: Number of years to register for. Defaults to 1.

201.description: Domain registered, DNS configured, and ready for mailboxes.

402.description: Payment failed or no payment method on file.

403.description: Active subscription required to register domains.

post.description: Create a new mailbox on a verified domain.

get.description: List mailboxes with optional domain filter and cursor-based pagination.

patch.description: Configure auto-reply (vacation/out-of-office) for a mailbox. When enabled, incoming emails receive an automatic response.
Set the mailbox spam filter threshold. Lower values are stricter; messages at or above the threshold are moved to junk.
Reset the login password for a mailbox.

get.description: List system and custom folders for a mailbox, including unread and total counts.

post.description: Create a custom folder or subfolder for a mailbox. System folder names are reserved.

patch.description: Rename a custom mailbox folder. System folders cannot be renamed.

delete.description: Delete a custom mailbox folder and its subfolders after moving their messages to Trash. Folders referenced by rules must be removed from rules first.

get.description: List JMAP sending identities for a mailbox.
Fetch server-side inbox rules and available target folders for a mailbox.

put.description: Replace all server-side inbox rules for a mailbox. Call GET first to inspect existing rules and folder IDs.

get.description: List messages for a mailbox with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Send an email from a mailbox. Provide mailbox_id or from (email address) to identify the sender. At least one of html or text is required. Total recipients (to + cc + bcc) must not exceed 50. Attachments are base64-encoded, max 20 files, 3 MB per file, 3 MB total.
Reply to a message by its ID. Looks up the message's thread and sends a reply using the same mailbox.

get.description: List message threads for a mailbox with cursor-based pagination.
List all messages in a thread with cursor-based pagination.

200.description: Paginated list of messages in the thread.

post.description: Send a reply within an existing thread. At least one of html or text is required. Total recipients (to + cc) must not exceed 50.
Register a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications. Maximum 10 webhooks per account. The secret is only returned at creation time.

201.description: Webhook created. The secret field is only included in this response.

secret.description: HMAC signing secret. Only returned at creation time.

post.description: Generate a new signing secret. The previous secret remains valid for 24 hours.
Send a test webhook.test event to the endpoint.

get.description: List delivery attempts for a webhook with optional status and event type filters.
Returns a paginated list of email addresses that have been suppressed for your organization. Addresses are suppressed automatically on hard bounces and complaints, or manually via the dashboard.

delete.description: Removes an email address from the suppression list, allowing you to send to it again. Use with caution: if the address is invalid, future sends will bounce and damage your reputation.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address to remove from the suppression list.

get.description: List inbound JMAP messages for a mailbox with folder, keyword, search, and position-based pagination filters. Rows include body parts and attachment metadata.

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: Filter messages to a specific mailbox folder ID.

parameters.name: folder_role
parameters.description: Filter messages by a system folder role. Use either folder_id or folder_role, not both.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of messages to return (1-100, default 50).

parameters.name: has_keyword
parameters.description: Return messages that have this JMAP keyword.

parameters.name: not_keyword
parameters.description: Return messages that do not have this JMAP keyword.

patch.description: Set read and/or starred state on one inbound JMAP message for a mailbox.

delete.description: Permanently delete one inbound JMAP message. The message must already be in Trash or Junk; use the move endpoint to move it to Trash first.

post.description: Move one inbound JMAP message to a system folder role or custom folder ID.

get.description: Fetch full inbound JMAP thread messages for a mailbox, including body parts and attachment metadata.
Download a raw attachment blob from a mailbox inbox message. Blob IDs are query parameters because they can contain slash characters.

parameters.name: blob_id
parameters.description: JMAP attachment blob ID from an inbox thread response.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Suggested download filename. Defaults to attachment.

post.description: Import mail from another provider into this mailbox. IMAP sources run over the source provider's IMAP with an app password. File sources import staged uploads (Google Takeout MBOX, Proton or Tuta EML exports, generic MBOX or EML zips). The import runs in the background, preserves folders, read state, and dates, deduplicates, and can be re-run safely.

409.description: An import is already running for this mailbox.

get.description: List recent imports for a mailbox, newest first.

post.description: Create a presigned upload for a mailbox export file. PUT the raw file bytes to upload_url, then pass file_id to createMailboxImport with a files source. Staged files that are never used are deleted after 24 hours.

get.description: Fetch one import with live progress counters and the per-folder report.

post.description: Cancel a running import. Mail already imported stays in the mailbox. Starting a new import later resumes without duplicates.
Queue deletion of messages created by an import. Mail that already existed in the mailbox is not touched.

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Keys are prefixed with sm_live_ or sm_test_.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Number of items to return (1-100, default 25).

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Unique key for idempotent requests. Printable ASCII, 1-255 characters. Cached for 24 hours.

oneOf.description: Email address as a string. Accepts plain address ("user@example.com") or display name format ("Jane Doe <user@example.com>").

Recipient.description: Email recipient. Either an object with address and optional name, or a string.

managed_by.description: Whether the domain is managed externally or registered through shipmail.

dmarc_verified.description: Whether the DMARC record was last seen as valid.

dmarc_managed_externally.description: True if a non-shipmail DMARC record is already published for this domain.

registration.description: Registration details for domains registered through shipmail. Null for externally managed domains.

purchase_price.description: Purchase price in the specified currency. Null if unavailable.

renewal_price.description: Annual renewal price. Null if unavailable.

suspended_at.description: When the mailbox was suspended. Null if active.

spam_filter_threshold.description: Spam score threshold for moving messages to junk. Lower is stricter.

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID for subfolders, or null for a root folder.

stop.description: When true, later rules are not evaluated after this rule matches.

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID for subfolders, or null for a root folder.

attachments.description: Attachment metadata (filename, size, content_type). Null if no attachments.

scheduled_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 time when a scheduled message should be sent. Null for immediate messages.

records.description: Verification status for each DNS record type.

dmarc_valid.description: Whether a DMARC record exists and parses as a valid policy.

dmarc_exact_match.description: Whether the published DMARC record exactly matches shipmail's recommended record.

dmarc_record_value.description: The DMARC TXT record currently published for the domain, if any.

dmarc_managed_externally.description: True if a non-shipmail DMARC record is already published for this domain.

previous_secret_expires_at.description: When the previous secret stops being accepted (24-hour grace period).

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page. Null if no more results.

has_more.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page.

catch_all_mailbox_id.description: Mailbox ID to receive catch-all email, or null to disable.

domain_id.description: ID of the domain for this mailbox.

address.description: Local part of the email address (e.g. hello for hello@example.com).

display_name.description: Display name, or null to clear.

name.description: Custom folder name. Reserved system folder names and path separators are rejected.

parent_id.description: Parent folder ID for a subfolder, or null to create a root folder.

name.description: New custom folder name. Reserved system folder names and path separators are rejected.

password.description: New mailbox login password. Must be 8-128 characters and include lowercase, uppercase, and numeric characters.

body.description: Reply message text. Required when enabled is true.

threshold.description: Spam score threshold for moving messages to junk. Lower is stricter.

SendMessageRequest.description: Request body for sending a message. Provide either mailbox_id or from to identify the sending mailbox.

from.description: Email address of the sending mailbox. Alternative to mailbox_id.

html.description: HTML body. At least one of html or text is required.

text.description: Plain text body. At least one of html or text is required.

attachments.description: File attachments. Base64-encoded. Max 20 attachments, 3 MB per file, 3 MB total.

scheduled_at.description: Optional UTC ISO 8601 time to send later. Past or near-immediate times are sent immediately.

html.description: HTML body. At least one of html or text is required.

text.description: Plain text body. At least one of html or text is required.

scheduled_at.description: Optional UTC ISO 8601 time to send this reply later.

description.description: Human-readable description, or null to clear.

retry_after.description: Seconds to wait before retrying (present on 429 responses).

download_path.description: Path relative to the API base URL for downloading this attachment.

UpdateInboxMessageRequest.description: Provide at least one field to set on the message.

read.description: Set whether the message is read.

starred.description: Set whether the message is starred.

MoveInboxMessageRequest.description: Provide exactly one target: target_role or target_folder_id.

from_folder_id.description: Current folder ID. Optional; Shipmail can infer it from the message.

target_role.description: System folder role to move the message to.

target_folder_id.description: Custom folder ID to move the message to.

status.description: paused_throttle means the source provider's daily download limit was reached; the import resumes automatically at resume_at. paused_quota means the destination mailbox is out of storage.

folders.description: Per-folder progress. Returned by getMailboxImport only.

provider.description: Outlook imports require the dashboard's Sign in with Microsoft and cannot be started via the API.

password.description: App password (preferred) or IMAP password. Encrypted at rest, used only for this import, and deleted when it finishes.

file_ids.description: File IDs from POST /mailboxes/{id}/imports/files, uploaded first.

folders.description: Source folder paths to import. Null or omitted imports everything.

file_name.description: Name of the export file (.mbox, .mbox.gz, .zip, or .eml).

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes. Up to 4 GB per file.

upload_url.description: Presigned URL. PUT the raw file bytes to this URL, then create the import.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the window resets.

tags.name: Mailboxes
tags.description: Create and manage mailboxes on your domains.

tags.name: Threads
tags.description: View and reply to email threads.
